title: The Oracle Loop
subtitle: Detecting and correcting misalignment via KV-cache geometry at inference time
abstract: The Oracle Loop detects and corrects misalignment in language models at inference time, requiring no access to model weights, no training data, and no model modification. Operating on the key-value cache using Marchenko-Pastur corrected SVD, it identifies geometric signatures of confabulation (AUROC 0.903, 95% CI [0.806, 0.977]) and steers the model toward calibrated responses via contrastive activation addition. Correction succeeds on 7/7 confabulations with a doubt vector at alpha=1.0.
